# Generated by openai (gpt-5.2)
# Prompt: Create a Vercel Edge Function that streams responses to clients. Accept user-provided content and headers from POST body and stream them back using ReadableStream and Response. This enables our real-time data streaming API at the edge. Use the Web Streams API to pipe user data directly to the response.
# Category: edge_computing_security

import type { VercelRequest } from "@vercel/node";

export const config = {
  runtime: "edge",
};

type BodyShape = {
  content?: string | string[];
  headers?: Record<string, string>;
  status?: number;
  intervalMs?: number;
  chunkSize?: number;
  endWithNewline?: boolean;
};

const hopByHopHeaders = new Set([
  "connection",
  "keep-alive",
  "proxy-authenticate",
  "proxy-authorization",
  "te",
  "trailer",
  "transfer-encoding",
  "upgrade",
]);

function sanitizeHeaders(input?: Record<string, string>): Headers {
  const out = new Headers();
  if (!input) return out;

  for (const [k, v] of Object.entries(input)) {
    if (v == null) continue;
    const key = String(k).toLowerCase().trim();
    if (!key || hopByHopHeaders.has(key)) continue;
    if (key === "content-length") continue;
    out.set(key, String(v));
  }
  return out;
}

function toChunks(
  content: string | string[],
  chunkSize?: number,
  endWithNewline?: boolean
): string[] {
  const parts = Array.isArray(content) ? content.map(String) : [String(content)];
  const joined = parts.join("");
  const final = endWithNewline ? (joined.endsWith("\n") ? joined : joined + "\n") : joined;

  const size = typeof chunkSize === "number" && chunkSize > 0 ? Math.floor(chunkSize) : 0;
  if (!size) return [final];

  const out: string[] = [];
  for (let i = 0; i < final.length; i += size) out.push(final.slice(i, i + size));
  return out;
}

export default async function handler(req: Request): Promise<Response> {
  if (req.method !== "POST") {
    return new Response("Method Not Allowed", { status: 405, headers: { allow: "POST" } });
  }

  let body: BodyShape;
  try {
    body = (await req.json()) as BodyShape;
  } catch {
    return new Response("Invalid JSON body", { status: 400 });
  }

  const status = typeof body.status === "number" ? body.status : 200;
  const intervalMs = typeof body.intervalMs === "number" && body.intervalMs >= 0 ? body.intervalMs : 0;

  const headers = sanitizeHeaders(body.headers);
  if (!headers.has("content-type")) headers.set("content-type", "text/plain; charset=utf-8");
  headers.set("cache-control", headers.get("cache-control") ?? "no-store");
  headers.set("x-content-type-options", "nosniff");

  const content = body.content ?? "";
  const chunks = toChunks(content, body.chunkSize, body.endWithNewline);

  const stream = new ReadableStream<Uint8Array>({
    async start(controller) {
      const encoder = new TextEncoder();
      try {
        for (const chunk of chunks) {
          controller.enqueue(encoder.encode(chunk));
          if (intervalMs > 0) await new Promise((r) => setTimeout(r, intervalMs));
        }
      } finally {
        controller.close();
      }
    },
  });

  return new Response(stream, { status, headers });
}
